name: Mace of Terror
description: This magic weapon has 3 charges and regains {@dice 1d3} expended charges daily at dawn. While holding the weapon, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action and expend 1 charge to release a wave of terror from it. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet of you must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB} in this way, a creature must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it c
